chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-30 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case For hearing of main case 26-04-2024 None present for the applicant. ***** None present for the applicant; same was the position on last two dates of hearing i.e. 11.03.2024 and 01.04.2024; no intimation is received so far. Accordingly, this Crl. Transfer Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
